scenario: claude adapter validate(component, changes, ctx) → Diagnostic[] for every recognized file in tests/fixtures/bundles/claude/. Mirrors lint/all-types.json's perType shape. SPECIFICATION golden.
adapterStatus: NOT IMPLEMENTED — spec-authored target (future Chunk-2 format-adapter work item).
specSource: docs/architecture/specs/akm-0.9.0-bundle-adapter-spec.md §6 (per-type validation column: command/agent `missing-name-or-type`; skill `missing-skill-md` + Agent Skills contract §4.5), §2/§5.1 (validate returns Diagnostic[] {file, issue, detail, fixed}). Per-adapter strictness: 'claude allows Claude Code's documented extension fields' (spec §6 skill row).
realWorldSource: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/claude-directory — command/agent frontmatter (argument-hint, allowed-tools, tools, model) are Claude Code extension fields the claude adapter tolerates
notes: SPECIFICATION golden — no claude adapter exists yet. Diagnostic shape is src/core/adapter/types.ts Diagnostic ({file, issue, detail, fixed}); the only skill check implemented in code today is `missing-skill-md` (src/commands/lint/skill-linter.ts + src/core/adapter/adapters/akm-lint.ts skillDirectoryDiagnostics). The Agent Skills field checks (name charset/length, description length, compatibility ≤500) are SPEC-DEFINED (§4.5), not yet coded — exercised in the agent-skills lint golden, not here.

Every fixture file is CONFORMANT, so every entry is []. This pins the KEY per-adapter distinction (spec §6 skill row): the `claude` adapter is LENIENT on unknown/extension frontmatter (argument-hint, allowed-tools, tools, model all pass), whereas `agent-skills` ERRORS on unknown frontmatter (skills-ref behavior). The pdf-processing skill has a valid SKILL.md, so `missing-skill-md` does not fire.

issue-code proposal: `missing-name-or-type` (command/agent) and `missing-skill-md` (skill) are the spec-named codes; the Agent Skills field codes are proposed in the agent-skills lint golden and are OPEN for the adapter author to finalize.

instruction.note: instruction → base validation only (spec §6 instruction row).

command.note: conformant: has a body $ARGUMENTS probe hit; argument-hint/allowed-tools are Claude Code extension fields → tolerated (lenient adapter). `missing-name-or-type` would fire only if neither a name nor a command-shaped signal were present.

agent.note: conformant: name + description present; tools/model are extension fields → tolerated.

skill.note: SKILL.md present → no `missing-skill-md`. name 'pdf-processing' (charset OK, == dir name) and description (< 1024) satisfy the Agent Skills hard rules. allowed-tools is tolerated by the lenient claude adapter (would be an `allowed-tools portability` SOFT warning under agent-skills strictness, not an error).
